name_en: [With full counter green packaging]!!️ Gucci continues to update colors with more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont collection with a modern perspective. This card holder is crafted from elegant taupe leather, with brand identity accessories presented in gold tone. Taupe leather
name_cn:
[With full counter green packaging]!!️ Gucci continues to update colors with more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont collection with a modern perspective. This card holder is crafted from elegant taupe leather, with brand identity accessories presented in gold tone. Taupe leather
Gold tone accessories, embossed fabric lining double G, interior: 8 card slots.
Model: 734944.
Closed dimensions: 8cm (W) x 12cm (H)
Open dimensions: 16cm (W) x 12cm (H)
Color: Elephant Grey full leather.
